title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git-style workflows to structured data, offering branches, commits, diffs, merges, pull requests, and rollback capabilities. The tool uses Prolly Trees for efficient data versioning and addresses collaboration challenges in ML datasets, test data, game configs, and production environments.
